Container.Name: scrutiny-collector-btrfs
Container.Overview: Scrutiny Btrfs Filesystem Collector (Hub/Spoke mode). Monitors Btrfs filesystem health and sends data to the Scrutiny web server. Requires a running Scrutiny web server instance and host Btrfs mount visibility.

Config.Name: API Endpoint
Config.Description: Scrutiny web server URL (e.g. http://scrutiny-web:8080). Required.

Config.Name: Host ID
Config.Description: Unique identifier for this collector host.

Config.Name: Cron Schedule
Config.Description: Btrfs filesystem data collection schedule (cron format). Default: every 15 minutes.

Config.Name: Run on Startup
Config.Description: Run Btrfs filesystem data collection immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: Host Mount Root
Config.Description: Bind mount the host paths that contain the Btrfs filesystems you want to monitor.

Config.Name: Btrfs State
Config.Description: Optional bind mount for persisted Btrfs scrub state.
